Module com.lulow.justtype
Package com.lulow.justtype.model

Class LevelConfig

java.lang.Object
com.lulow.justtype.model.LevelConfig
public final class LevelConfig extends Object
Configuration constants and utility methods for game levels. Defines timing rules, difficulty tiers, and win condition.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    LevelConfig.Tier
    Difficulty tiers used to select word sets and apply visual effects.

  • Field Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    INITIAL_TIME
    Starting time in seconds for the first set of levels.
    static final int
    MIN_TIME
    Minimum time in seconds a level can have.
    static final int
    WIN_LEVEL
    The level number that triggers the win screen when surpassed.

  • Method Details

    • getTierForLevel

      public static LevelConfig.Tier getTierForLevel(int level)
      Returns the difficulty tier for a given level.
      Parameters:
      level - the current level number
      Returns:
      the corresponding LevelConfig.Tier

    • getMaxTimeForLevel

      public static int getMaxTimeForLevel(int level)
      Calculates the time limit for a given level. The time decreases by 2s every 5 levels, down to a minimum of 2s.
      Parameters:
      level - the current level number
      Returns:
      time limit in seconds
